1: But a foolish son is is the heaviness of his mother.
3: But he casteth away the substance of the wicked.
4: But the hand of the diligent maketh rich.
5: But But he that sleepeth in harvest is is a son that causeth shame.
6: But violence covereth the mouth of the wicked.
7: But the name of the wicked shall rot.
8: But a prating fool shall fall.
9: But he that perverteth his ways shall be known.
10: But a prating fool shall fall.
11: But violence covereth the mouth of the wicked.
13: But a rod is is for the back of him that is void of understanding.
14: But the mouth of the foolish is is near destruction.
15: The destruction of the poor is is their poverty.
16: The fruit of the wicked to sin.
17: But he that refuseth reproof erreth.
18: And he that uttereth a slander, is is a fool.
19: But he that refraineth his lips is is wise.
20: The heart of the wicked is is little worth.
21: But fools die for want of wisdom.
22: And he addeth no sorrow with it.
23: But a man of understanding hath wisdom.
24: But the desire of the righteous shall be granted.
25: But the righteous is is an everlasting foundation.
26: So is is the sluggard to them that send him.
27: But the years of the wicked shall be shortened.
28: But the expectation of the wicked shall perish.
29: But destruction shall be shall be to the workers of iniquity.
30: But the wicked shall not inhabit the earth.
31: But the froward tongue shall be cut out.
